description_long: This object represents a male security guard with an exaggerated, distorted body shape, featuring extremely elongated arms and legs. The guard is dressed in a formal, dark-colored uniform with a white shirt and a black jacket, buttoned at the front, and matching black trousers. His facial features are visible, with short brown hair and a stern expression, giving him an authoritative presence. The arms are stretched out to the sides in an unnatural manner, making the figure appear almost wing-like, while the legs are similarly extended, with one foot slightly forward. The uniform is sleek and smooth, with no visible accessories or equipment such as hats, belts, or radios. The overall appearance is stylized and abstract, deviating significantly from realistic human proportions.
description: A male security guard in a formal black uniform with extremely elongated arms and legs, standing in a stylized, abstract pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the guard's face, buttoned jacket, and dramatically outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length of the arms and legs, with minimal detail on the face.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head, jacket, and the unusual spread of the arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the elongated limbs and the guard's stance.
attribute_uniform_type: A formal black security uniform consisting of a buttoned jacket, white dress shirt, and black trousers, with no visible tie, hat, or additional accessories; the style is standardized and sleek, with a professional appearance.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms dramatically extended outward and one leg slightly forward, conveying a rigid and alert demeanor.
